properties.body:
WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
URUGUAY.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY BY M/V RAMFORM VANGUARD TOWING 12
   7000 METER LONG CABLES:
   A. 09 NOV ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      35-21.57S 052-12.33W AND 36-15.13S 053-06.07W.
   B. 09 AND 10 NOV ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      36-02.92S 053-04.53W AND 35-15.88S 052-17.40W.
   C. 10 NOV ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      35-23.08S 052-33.23W AND 35-55.68S 053-05.98W.
   NINE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2816/13.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 11 NOV 13.
